meanings.usage: 指与平常不同的、特别的情况
可指具体的建筑或教育活动
指从午夜到中午这段时间
指中午到傍晚这段时间
指房屋周围的种植区域
指下午到睡觉前的时间
学生在家完成的学习任务
指每日发行的新闻印刷品
用来描述引起兴趣的事物

examples.en: The children are going to school on foot today.
examples.zh: 孩子们今天步行去上学。

examples.en: At the moment, they are playing in the garden.
examples.zh: 此刻，他们正在花园里玩耍。

examples.en: The children usually do their homework in the evening.
examples.zh: 孩子们通常在晚上做家庭作业。

examples.en: The children go to school by car every day.
examples.zh: 孩子们每天乘汽车去上学。

examples.en: This morning, she is going to the shops.
Mrs. Sawyer usually drinks tea in the living room.
examples.zh: 索耶太太通常在客厅喝茶。

examples.en: Mr. Sawyer usually reads his newspaper at night.
examples.zh: 索耶先生通常在晚上看报纸。

examples.en: She is drinking tea in the garden this afternoon.
examples.zh: 今天下午她正在花园里喝茶。

examples.en: He reads his newspaper at night.
Mrs. Sawyer usually stays at home in the morning.
examples.zh: 索耶太太通常上午待在家里。

grammar.title: 一般现在时与现在进行时的对比 (Simple Present vs Present Continuous)
grammar.definition: 一般现在时表示习惯性、经常性的动作；现在进行时表示此刻正在进行的动作。通过对比两者，可以描述某一天发生的事情与平时的不同。
grammar.structure: 主语 + usually + 动词原形/三单形式... but + 主语 + am/is/are + 动词-ing + 时间状语
grammar.usage: 用于描述某人通常做某事，但今天/此刻正在做另一件事

examples.en: The children go to school by car every day, but today, they are going to school on foot.
examples.zh: 孩子们每天乘汽车去上学，但今天他们步行去上学。

examples.en: Mr. Sawyer usually reads his newspaper at night. But tonight, he's reading an interesting book.
examples.zh: 索耶先生通常在晚上看报纸。但今晚他在读一本有趣的书。

grammar.title: 时间表达法 (Time Expressions)
grammar.definition: 使用具体的钟点时间来标记一天中不同时间段发生的事情
grammar.usage: 用于引出不同时间点发生的事情，常与现在进行时连用

examples.en: It is eight o'clock. The children are going to school on foot.
examples.zh: 现在是八点。孩子们正在步行去上学。

examples.en: It is six o'clock. The children are playing in the garden.
examples.zh: 现在是六点。孩子们正在花园里玩耍。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It is + 时间. + 主语 usually + 动词..., but + 主语 + be动词 + 动词-ing + 时间.

original.en: It is four o'clock. Mrs. Sawyer usually drinks tea in the living room. But this afternoon, she is drinking tea in the garden.
original.zh: 现在是四点。索耶太太通常在客厅喝茶。但今天下午她在花园里喝茶。

imitations.en: It is seven o'clock. Tom usually eats dinner at home. But tonight, he is eating dinner at a restaurant.
imitations.zh: 现在是七点。汤姆通常在家吃晚饭。但今晚他在餐厅吃晚饭。

imitations.en: It is nine o'clock. Lisa usually sleeps early, but tonight she is watching TV.
imitations.zh: 现在是九点。莉莎通常早睡，但今晚她在看电视。

sentencePatterns.pattern: At the moment, 主语 + be动词 + 动词-ing...

original.en: At the moment, they are playing in the garden.
original.zh: 此刻，他们正在花园里玩耍。

imitations.en: At the moment, she is reading a book.
At the moment, he is cooking dinner.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + usually + 动词..., but + 主语 + be动词 + not + 动词-ing...

original.en: In the evening, the children usually do their homework, but this evening, they are not doing their homework.
original.zh: 晚上，孩子们通常做家庭作业，但今晚他们没在做家庭作业。

imitations.en: Usually, I watch TV in the evening, but today I am not watching TV.
imitations.zh: 通常我晚上看电视，但今天我没在看。

imitations.en: He usually works late, but today he is not working.
imitations.zh: 他通常工作到很晚，但今天他没在工作。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + usually + 动词原形/三单形式 + 时间状语. But + 主语 + be动词 + 动词-ing + tonight/today/this...

original.en: Mr. Sawyer usually reads his newspaper at night. But he's not reading his newspaper tonight.
original.zh: 索耶先生通常在晚上看报纸。但今晚他没在看报纸。

imitations.en: I usually drink coffee in the morning. But this morning I am drinking tea.
imitations.zh: 我通常早上喝咖啡。但今天早上我在喝茶。

imitations.en: She usually wears a dress, but today she is wearing trousers.
imitations.zh: 她通常穿连衣裙，但今天她穿着裤子。
